da.hero_subtitle: Københavns førende infrarøde boutique hot yoga studio. Daglige klasser i 30-38°C med infrarød teknologi, der opvarmer kroppen direkte — ikke luften.
da.intro_text: Hot yoga er yoga i et opvarmet rum, typisk mellem 30-38°C. Varmen øger blodcirkulationen, løsner muskler og led, og giver en dybere stræk- og styrkeoplevelse. Hos Hot Yoga Copenhagen bruger vi infrarød teknologi, der opvarmer kroppen direkte i stedet for luften — det giver renere luft, dybere varmeindtrængning og en mere behagelig oplevelse.
da.intro_text2: Hot yoga er for alle — uanset alder, form eller erfaring. Vi har klasser fra blide Yin-sessioner til intensive Vinyasa-flows og alt derimellem.
da.ir_text: I modsætning til konventionelle opvarmningssystemer bruger vores infrarøde paneler dyb varmeindtrængning, der:
da.ir_point2: Giver renere, friskere luft i studiet
da.ir_point3: Trænger dybere ind i muskler og led
da.class1_desc: Dynamisk flow efterfulgt af dybe stræk. Vores mest populære klasse.
da.class2_desc: Klassisk yoga med hold og alignment, afsluttet med Yin.
da.class4_desc: Den originale hot yoga-serie. 90 minutter, 26 stillinger.
da.class5_desc: Dybe, passive stræk holdt i 3-5 minutter. Fokus på bindevæv.
da.class6_desc: Højintensitets hot yoga — vores mest udfordrende klasse.
da.rit1_desc: Et iskoldt håndklæde over pande og øjne under Shavasana — køler centralnervesystemet ned efter en intens klasse. 7-10 minutters komplet afslapning.
da.rit2_desc: Lavfrekvente lydbølger på 20-23 Hz stimulerer det parasympatiske nervesystem. Kroppen når dyb afslapning markant hurtigere.
da.rit3_desc: Friskpressede ingefærshots med citron og æblejuice efter hver klasse. Styrker immunforsvaret og genopretter blodsukkeret.
da.rit4_desc: Vores urte-te-blanding har været uændret i over 10 år — omhyggeligt sammensat til afslapning og restitution.
da.cta_subtitle: Book din første klasse i dag. Ingen erfaring nødvendig.

en.hero_subtitle: Copenhagen's leading infrared boutique hot yoga studio. Daily classes at 30-38°C with infrared technology that heats the body directly — not the air.
en.intro_text: Hot yoga is yoga practiced in a heated room, typically between 30-38°C (86-100°F). The heat increases blood circulation, loosens muscles and joints, and provides a deeper stretching and strengthening experience. At Hot Yoga Copenhagen, we use infrared technology that heats the body directly instead of the air — resulting in cleaner air, deeper heat penetration, and a more comfortable experience.
en.intro_text2: Hot yoga is for everyone — regardless of age, shape, or experience level. We offer classes ranging from gentle Yin sessions to intensive Vinyasa flows and everything in between.
en.ir_text: Unlike conventional heating systems, our infrared panels use deep heat penetration that:
en.ir_point1: Heats the body directly — not the air
en.ir_point2: Provides cleaner, fresher air in the studio
en.ir_point3: Penetrates deeper into muscles and joints
en.class1_desc: Dynamic flow followed by deep stretches. Our most popular class.
en.class2_desc: Classical yoga with holds and alignment, finished with Yin.
en.class3_desc: Our signature method — 26 postures, 2 breathing exercises.
en.class4_desc: The original hot yoga series. 90 minutes, 26 postures.
en.class5_desc: Deep, passive stretches held for 3-5 minutes. Focus on connective tissue.
en.class6_desc: High-intensity hot yoga — our most challenging class.
en.rit1_desc: An ice-cold towel placed over forehead and eyes during Shavasana — instantly cools the central nervous system after an intense class. 7-10 minutes of complete relaxation.
en.rit2_desc: Low-frequency sound waves at 20-23 Hz stimulate the parasympathetic nervous system. The body reaches deep relaxation significantly faster.
en.rit3_desc: Freshly pressed ginger shots with lemon and apple juice after every class. Boosts the immune system and restores blood sugar levels.
en.rit4_desc: Our herbal tea blend has been unchanged for over 10 years — carefully composed for relaxation and recovery.
en.cta_subtitle: Book your first class today. No experience needed.
